heading: Transfer date
label: 2261 Transfer date
text: In this subchapter, the term “transfer date” means the date occurring on the first day of the first pay period (applicable to employees transferred under ) occurring on or after 30 days after .section 2241 of this titleOctober 20, 2008
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title IV of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title IV to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 110–437122 Stat. 4990Oct. 20, 2008
